entity.description: Vista Solutions Inc. is a leading North American provider of machine vision integration and consultancy services, with offices in the USA, Canada, and Mexico. Vista’s primary objective is to be the “one-stop-shop” for all things related to machine vision - solutions, service, consultancy, and hardware. Vista designs and delivers automated machine vision solutions to a diverse client and industry base including Manufacturing (Automotive, Food and Beverage, Medical Devices, Consumer Products, Aerospace, etc.), Logistics, Infrastructure, and Mining. Vista’s offices are home to some of the most advanced machine vision laboratories in North America, including 6-axis robots, conveyance systems, and machine vision hardware (including cameras, lighting, 3D imagers, etc.) - everything required to setup Vista’s clients for machine vision success from Step #1: Image. Vista’s Areas of Expertise Include: • Automated Inspection (Quality Assurance, Defect Detection, etc.) • Vision-Guided Robotics • Non-Contact Measurement and Gauging • Tracking and Traceability (OCR, Barcodes, etc.) • Artificial Intelligence (AI) -based Inspection Solutions Vista’s Services Include: • On-Site Support / Service • Solution Integration / Deployment Services • Vision Evaluative Services - Camera and Lighting Selection - On-Site Assessments - Development of Vision Integration Standards • Machine Vision R&D - Engineering / Feasibility Studies - Proof of Concepts (PoCs) / Prototype Vision Systems • Vision Software Development - Custom Software Applications - Vision Algorithm Development - AI-based Inspection Models • Consultation - Design Review / Auditing Services - Scale-Up / Roll-Out Planning Vista’s Process: Vista’s 3-step approach to machine vision feasibility, risk mitigation, and client success. 1. Image 2. Analyze 3. Automate

Computers-System Designers & Consultants

Vista Solutions Corporation provides information technology solutions. The Company offers access, protect and manage the data of small business, enterprise, and healthcare sectors. Vista Solutions conducts its business in the State of Colorado.

Vista Solutions is a market leading advanced engineering and technology company with a technical and business model focus on the field of machine vision integration.

Vista Solutions is comprised of three business units: 
1) Smart Camera Solutions
2) Custom Solutions
3) Vision Guided Robotics

Vista Solutions is experienced in many industries including automotive, metal casting, medical devices, pharmaceutical, food & beverage, packaging & paper, consumer products, military/defence, aerospace, energy/nuclear and government. 

Vista Solutions maintains offices and state-of-the-art laboratories in Canada, United States and Mexico.

Vista Solutions specializes in working IT & business professionals executives who are frustrated with the time and money wasted dealing with slow applications and websites or are concerned that they might not discover a security breach before it's too late. 

Generally, our clients come to us because they are:

-	Tired of users and customers complaining that they can't work
-	Irritated that it takes so long to identify the source of a problem
-	Worried that not knowing what is going on in their network is making them more vulnerable to security risks

For over 40 years, Vista Solutions has helped everyone from small businesses to international Fortune 100 companies saved millions of dollars and hundreds of productive hours by helping them find and fix performance and security issues faster. 

We may not be the best choice for every business, but the clients we work with stay with us for years because they trust us and the solutions we deliver.

If any of these are issues you are facing, we may be able to help.

Contact us to see if we might be a good fit: 

http://vistasolutions.net/contact-us/

For more than 45 years, Vista Solutions Corporation has been manufacturing computers, system designers and computer software. Located in Fort Collins, Colo., the company is a full-service information technology engineering firm. Vista Solutions Corporation has a vast client list ranging from Fortune 50 to mid-tier organizations across many industries. The company has designed information technology solutions for over 100 enterprise clients. It specializes in high-availability computing, disaster recovery, data protection, information lifecycle management, enterprise storage and backup and many others. Vista Solutions Corporation has partnerships with a number of companies, including Hewlett-Packard Development Company, L.P, DataCore Software and SYNNEX Corporation, among others.

entity.description:
Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems (IVMS) provides advanced machine vision, precision metrology and automation solutions for manufacturers where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

IVMS was formed in 2026 through the merger of Industrial Vision Systems and The Sempre Group, combining automated machine vision engineering with deep expertise in high-precision metrology. The result is a broader capability supporting manufacturers with both automated inspection systems and advanced measurement technologies.

Our solutions are used across manufacturing environments where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

CAPABILITIES
• Automated machine vision inspection systems
• Precision metrology technologies and measurement solutions
• Inline and offline inspection for manufacturing processes
• Vision-guided automation and robotics integration
• Engineering, system integration and technical support

IVMS solutions range from bespoke machine vision systems and integrated inspection machines through to high-precision metrology instruments and software for advanced measurement, data analysis and quality control.

INDUSTRIES
• Medical devices & pharmaceuticals
• Aerospace & precision engineering
• Automotive & electrification
• Electronics & semiconductors
• Advanced industrial manufacturing

Through a combination of advanced imaging, AI-enabled vision software, high-accuracy metrology technologies and automation integration, IVMS helps manufacturers move towards fully digital, data-driven production environments.

IVMS is part of Oxford Metrics plc, a global smart sensing and software company focused on advanced measurement, sensing and data technologies.

entity.description: Smitech develops and delivers turnkey automation solutions for manufacturing companies. The company designs and builds production lines, fully automated and semi-automated assembly equipment, and industrial robot systems, including collaborative and mobile robots. Its engineers implement industrial automation and control systems, machine vision solutions for quality inspection, and custom machine-building projects across sectors such as electronics, automotive, wood, plastics, and construction. Smitech supports customers from concept development through engineering, component sourcing, assembly, software development, on-site installation, and commissioning. It also provides aftercare services including maintenance, upgrades, spare parts, and training for production personnel.

At Smitech, we're committed to providing the highest quality factory automation solutions for manufacturing companies of all sizes. With a team of engineers with over 10 years of experience in the industry, we've established ourselves as a leading provider of cutting-edge automation technologies and services.

Our team of experts works closely with clients to understand their unique needs and develop customized solutions that maximize efficiency, improve productivity, and reduce costs. Whether it's designing and implementing new production lines or upgrading existing systems, we have the expertise and resources to ensure success.

At Smitech, we pride ourselves on our dedication to quality, reliability, and innovation. Our solutions are designed to meet the highest industry standards and are backed by our commitment to ongoing support and maintenance.

We're excited to help businesses across a wide range of industries optimize their manufacturing processes and achieve their goals. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help take your business to the next level.

To learn more about our factory automation solutions and services, please visit our website at www.smitech.ee/en

allDescriptions: Isra Vision AG is a Germany-based company that, through its subsidiaries, is engaged in the development, production and marketing of industrial image processing systems.
Public company
ISRA SURFACE VISION is a industrial automation company their's high-performance components, in high-resolution cameras & fast-switching LED.

Isra Vision AG develops and markets control software and systems for image processing, optics, industrial process skills, and robotics. The Company produces two and three dimensional robot controls for goods manufacturing and quality assurance. Isra Vision serves customers worldwide.

Machine Vision is one of the key technologies for industrial digitization, and ISRA VISION is one of the international providers that has been ensuring the success of large manufacturing companies worldwide for over 35 years. ISRA's high-performance technologies, in particular, high-resolution cameras and fast-switching LEDs, enable capturing structures in the nanometer and nanopixel range, even at extremely high speeds.

ISRA VISION is a globally leading supplier of optical solutions for 3D machine vision and surface inspection.

Our innovative core competencies are based in the development of user-specific software for sophisticated, intelligent Machine Vision systems, firmware & hardware.

We offer efficient Machine Vision solutions for automation of highly complex tasks in the following important areas:

Robot Vision - Robot guidance for difficult tasks such as positioning, assembly, handling or paint finishing. Our portfolio of internationally unique solutions ranges from 2 D to 6 D.

Surface Vision - Guaranteed quality with 100% inspection of glass, foils, metals, paper and plastics at high speeds or complex paint finished surfaces.

Machine Vision is one of the key technologies for industrial digitization, and ISRA VISION is one of the international providers that has been ensuring the success of large manufacturing companies worldwide for over 35 years - in close cooperation with leading technology universities and innovation centers. ISRA's high-performance components, in particular, high-resolution cameras and fast-switching LEDs, enable capturing structures in the nanometer and nanopixel range, even at extremely high speeds.

Since its foundation, ISRA's focus and strengths have been in the development of advanced embedded technologies and highly complex algorithms and bring them to market as easy-to-use touch-and-automate and plug-and-automate systems. These machine systems, based on Industry 4.0-enabled concepts, provide an effective foundation for sustainable customer success based on the partnership from consulting to integration. From process automation and product optimization to product efficiency and revenue maximization, our innovative portfolio covers the entire production chain, deployed in renowned companies from around the world. For example, international premium car manufacturers and well-known market leaders from the information and communication industries rely on automation technology solutions from ISRA.

On three continents and at more than 25 locations worldwide, we are always close to our customers and continuously support them in maximizing their production success. While at the same time, we are already developing systems for the visions of future industrial production, based on our broad technology portfolio and thus offering our partner companies a quick return on investment.

entity.name: Worldwide Quality Control
entity.description:
ABOUT US 
Worldwide Quality Control (formerly Asia Quality Control) was established in 2011 with a clear vision in mind: to deliver top-notch quality inspection services that help businesses achieve their quality goals and maximize their global market success. 

With over more than 10 years of industry experience, our team of engineering experts is committed to providing the highest quality services to our clients in 

OUR SERVICES
# Our Quality Inspection Services:
•	Pre-production Inspections: We scrutinize raw materials, components, and processes before production commences to prevent costly errors.
•	In-process Inspections: We monitor the manufacturing process to ensure consistent product quality throughout production.
•	Pre-shipment Inspections: We perform thorough quality checks before shipment to avoid costly returns and recalls.
•	Production Monitoring: We perform day to day monitoring of your production
•	Defectives Sorting: We perform sorting of defectives products on your proudction line.


# Our Supplier Audit Services:
•	Supplier Qualification Audits: We assess supplier capabilities to meet your quality and compliance requirements.
•	Supplier Performance Audits: We conduct regular audits to ensure suppliers maintain their quality standards.
•	Compliance Audits: We ensure suppliers adhere to all industry standards and regulatory requirements.

# Our other Services:
- Defects Root Cause Analysis and Resolution
- Quality Control checklist establishment

# Product Testing & Certification
- Lab Testing
- Product Certification

# Industries:
Automotives, Railway, Aerospace, Technical and Industrial, Electronic, Mechanical Parts, Building and Construction, Medical Devices and Supplies, Food, Consumer  

CONTACT US
If you are in search of reliable quality inspection services in Worldwide, Worldwide Quality Control is here to assist you.

entity.description: CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. We are pioneers in leveraging CV and associated technologies in the visual inspection process. We deploy our solutions through bespoke Rigs, mobile devices or UAVs depending on the customer requirements for precision and speed. We work closely with our customers to enable retrofit solutions that do not require too many changes to the existing workflow. Defect/damage visual inspections are labour intensive and therefore subjective, slow, and prone to error. We eliminate subjectivity, future proof the process and make sure that the current throughput is not affected in any way. Our solution is the ultimate control tower that enables creation of a visual track and trace audit trail across the life cycle of the product. Our solutions increase efficiencies and offer non-linear scalability. We ensure contactless solutions that enable our partners to have business continuity. Our current operations are in India, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. We plan to expand into other regions very soon and position ourselves as the quality inspection partner of choice for enterprises across the world by future proofing their processes. We are headquartered in Bangalore, INDIA and have an office in Dubai, UAE. The company has today grown into a strong team of technocrats and thinkers who are reimagining the future.

allDescriptions: HANZA is a fast growing industrial business partner within manufacturing.

HANZA Group are a global industrial business partner within manufacturing. They have learned that, in order to be successful in this industry, you can not only focus on production. You need to understand how to improve the existing business of your customers. They have taken all their knowledge and experience and developed a concept they call MIG™. By using this concept together with their full range of manufacturing solutions (mechanics, electronics, cables and final assembly) they offer a partnership that will increase growth and profitability for every customer. It doesn’t end here. By combining the minds of more than 2800 brilliant co-workers you will engage a strong, creative and strategic partner that continuously will be ahead of the game.

Hanza AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, provides contract manufacturing solutions in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Germany, Poland, the Czech Republic, rest of the European Union, Norway, rest of Europe, North America, and internationally. It operates through Main Markets, Other Markets, and Business Development and Services segments. The company offers machining solutions comprising grinding, turbine component, milling, turning, electrical discharge machining, assembly, logistics, and prototype services; sheet metal processing solutions consisting of punching and laser cutting, bending, welding, coating, and surface treatment services; heavy mechanics solutions, such as welding TIG/MIG, machining, and cutting technologies solutions; and electronics manufacturing solutions, including research and development, printed circuit board assembly, and research and development test development center services. It also provides wire harness solutions comprising automated cut-strip-crimp wire processing, cut and strip technology, crimp tool, low- and high-pressure molding of cables, cable and label marking, multi-channel testing, and ultrasonic welding services, as well as laser engraving, pad printing, and hot stamping for plastic parts; and assembly solutions, including design and development, test development, and design and adaptation services. In addition, the company offers business consulting; and tech solutions, including development projects, electronics, mechanics, and software. Hanza AB (publ) was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.

Hanza AB is a Sweden-based company operating as an industrial business partner providing manufacture services. It provides complete manufacture solutions in the areas of mechanics, electronics, cable harnesses and final assembly. The Company has two segments: Mechanics, further divided into the Light Mechanics division; and the Heavy Mechanics division; and Electronics, further divided into Printed Circuit Board (PCB), which offers assembly of both flexible boards and large PCBs, KA Elektronik AB, as well as services such as automated optical inspection and testing, and Technology cabling, which manufactures and supplies cables for all applications. The department Business Solutions involves strategy, business development, marketing and business implementation of Hanza AB's concepts. The Company operates in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Poland, Slovakia and China. Its customers include Atlas Copco, Ericsson, ABB, and Saab Defense.

HANZA AB operates as a streamlining contract manufacturing. The Company manufactures and distributes machine tools, sheet metal, PCB assembly, and electronic cables for manufacturing companies. HANZA serves customers worldwide.

HANZA jest w pełni uniwersalną agencją interaktywną. Oferuje kompleksowe rozwiązania internetowe - od kreacji, pomysłów, nieszablonowej grafiki po rozwiązania technologiczne, zarządzanie projektami i ich późniejszą obsługę. Prowadzimy kampanie marketingowe oraz pozycjonowanie serwisów w wyszukiwarkach. Internet nie ma przed nami wielu tajemnic.

HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry.
Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services,
we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers.
This means we are contributing to a better and more sustainable future.

The company was founded in 2008 and today has sales exceeding SEK 2 billion, with operations in Sweden, Germany, Finland, Estonia, Poland,
the Czech Republic and China. Among our clients you find leading companies such as ABB, Epiroc, Getinge, Oerlikon, Saab and Siemens.

We are operating in six HANZA Clusters, offering many different manufacturing technologies:
PCBA, cable harnesses, turning, sheet metal mechanics, milling, heavy mechanincs, surface treatment, powder coating, welding, assembly, testing, design & engineering services and more.
We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, OHSAS 18001, TS 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories.

Awards:
HANZA appointed Supplier of the year by 3M (2019)
HANZA Mechanics Tartu “Supplier Excellence Award in a fight against Covid-19\' by PerkinElmer (2020)

Hanza AB provides professional engineering services. The Company offers mechanics and electronics related services including turning, milling, sheet metal production, surface mounting, and inspection. Hanza serves customers throughout Europe.

Vaasa Mechanics Oy, doing business as HANZA Mechanics Finland, Oy, manufactures and assembles sheet metal mechanics. The Company produces a range of solutions contributing to its parent's product offering using various processes including turretpunching, bending, excentric pressing, automatic pressing, and welding. HANZA Mechanics Finland serves customers throughout Scandinavia.

HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry. Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services, we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers. The company was founded in 2008 and has since 2019 had sales exceeding SEK 2 billion. The company has six manufacturing clusters; Sweden, Finland, Germany, Baltics, Central Europe and China. Among HANZA’s clients are leading companies such as 3M, ABB, Epiroc, GE, Getinge, John Deere, SAAB, Sandvik, Siemens and Tomra. Our factories are strategically located geographically close to each other, in so-called manufacturing clusters, to create synergies between the various technologies such as shorter lead times, fewer transports, reduced emissions and lower total costs. With a total of 130,000 square meters of production area divided between 17 factories and 7 factory parks in Europe and Asia, we offer complete manufacturing in electronics, machining, sheet metal mechanics, heavy mechanics, wire harnesses and complex assembly services. Our manufacturing clusters bring together state-of-the-art machines for virtually all production needs. We always strive to minimize costs, shorten lead times and reduce environmental impact, primarily by increasing efficiency and reducing the need for transport. A high degree of automation and flexibility means that we can handle both smaller and larger volumes. We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, ISO 27001, ISO 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories. Contract Electronics Manufacturing & Production

Contract Production Ltd specialises in providing low to medium volume contract electronics manufacturing (CEM) services to a range of companies across a wide variety of industries and market sectors.

We offer PCB assembly, box build, 3D AOI and turnkey assembly services covering material procurement, supply chain management, PCB Assembly,  Prototyping, Testing and quality assurance all under one roof.


Our customers cover a range of high technology market sectors including instrumentation, test and measurement and monitoring and for each of these customers we provide a range of different services, each tailored to suit their own individual needs.


Our range of services includes:

    Automated high-speed SMT assembly
    Conventional through-hole assembly
    Complete box build and test solutions
    3D Automated Optical Inspection (AOI)
    Full test and inspection
    Wave Soldering
    Conformal Coating
    Potting & Encapsulation
    Procurement and QA
    Project Management
